scripts.deploy: npm run dist && rm -rf /home/x4d1/.local/bin/aniworld-app && mkdir -p /home/x4d1/.local/bin/aniworld-app && cp -r dist/linux-unpacked/* /home/x4d1/.local/bin/aniworld-app/ && cp icon.png /home/x4d1/.local/bin/aniworld-app/icon.png && chmod +x /home/x4d1/.local/bin/aniworld-app/aniworld-app && chmod +x ~/.local/share/applications/aniworld.desktop && update-desktop-database ~/.local/share/applications/
